scene_summary: A pale icy basin plate with translucent cracked membranes at the left and right edges, scattered porcelain-like circular ripple nodes, tiny pinholes, a repaired gray tile inset, and two black barbell seams pinned to opposite corners. The field stays mostly open, with source windows embedded as scars, glows, apertures, and edge hardware rather than cards.
usable_surfaces: porcelain ripple rings in basin skin
tiny square glint and hairline cracks

detected_objects.label: hero translucent basin cut for Clinamen article
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A large red-orange translucent torn membrane and vertical basin cut runs down the left edge, with visible veined cracks, folded surfaces, and glowing red interior slits.

detected_objects.label: hero floating porcelain ring from Clinamen image
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A prominent raised porcelain-like circular node sits in the upper central basin, with a white wet rim, darker lower shadow, and subtle concentric ripple halo.

detected_objects.label: gray-card notch
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A dull gray repaired rectangular tile sits below center, slightly rotated, its cracked paper-like surface and patched edges forming a clear perimeter interruption.

detected_objects.label: impact ripple dent
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A compressed circular dent near the lower-left center has a raised pale impact ring, darker lower shadow, and faint ripple arcs radiating through the basin skin.

detected_objects.label: Agent Tool Reliquary
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A diagonal chain of pale bead-like distortions and scan-shimmer dents crosses the right-center field, forming a thin liquid reliquary rather than a screen.

detected_objects.label: impact ripple dent
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate is expressionist but restrained: most of the image remains a quiet pale basin, while a few edge membranes, porcelain nodes, seams, and pinholes carry the interaction marks without becoming clutter.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
